summary: Backend API testing completed for Vivo BI Dashboard iteration 3. All 24 tests passed. Verified: (1) NEW /api/analytics/new-styles endpoint returns styles with launch dates within N months window, (2) /api/analytics/kpis-plus correctly respects store_id filter for country-specific KPIs, (3) All existing endpoints still working.
critical_code_review_comments: NEW /api/analytics/new-styles endpoint correctly parses SKU pattern ^[A-Z]+(\d{2})(\d{2}) to extract MM/YY launch date
Sorting is correct: launch_sort descending (newest first), then units_sold descending for ties
store_id filter on /api/analytics/kpis-plus works correctly - Uganda=3,805,746, Kenya=39,815,393, Rwanda=1,602,236 (sum matches group total)
months parameter correctly expands window: months=1 (0 styles), months=3 (37 styles), months=6 (51 styles), months=12 (77 styles)
Previous month/year date ranges work for MoM/YoY comparisons
seed_data_creation: None - uses external Vivo BI API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working. NEW endpoint /api/analytics/new-styles tested with months=1,3,6,12. Store_id filter verified: vivo-uganda, vivofashiongroup (Kenya), vivo-rwanda. Data shows styles launched in Jan/Feb 2026 and older months (no Mar/Apr 2026 launches in current data). Date range 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-17 has data.
